summary: Iteration 17: AI Credits purchase (Stripe) and PDF report generation - ALL TESTS PASSED. Fixed import from emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout is working correctly. Comprar button successfully redirects to Stripe checkout without showing 'Erro ao iniciar compra' error.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@labrand.com.br returns token
Backend: GET /api/ai-credits/balance returns available_credits, total_credits, used_credits
Backend: GET /api/ai-credits/history returns history array
Backend: POST /api/ai-credits/purchase with package_id 'starter' returns checkout_url and session_id
Backend: POST /api/ai-credits/purchase with package_id 'pro' returns checkout_url and session_id
Backend: POST /api/ai-credits/purchase with package_id 'enterprise' returns checkout_url and session_id
Backend: POST /api/ai-credits/purchase with invalid package_id returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/ai-credits/purchase without origin_url returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/reports/executive-pdf returns application/pdf content-type
Backend: PDF generation with minimal sections works
Backend: PDF generation with invalid brand_id returns 404
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/reports/history returns report list
Backend: Balance endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: History endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: Purchase endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: PDF report endpoint requires authentication (401)
Frontend: AI Credits page loads at /ai-credits
Frontend: Credits balance displayed (99 available, Total: 100, Usados: 1)
Frontend: All 3 packages displayed (Starter, Pro, Enterprise)
Frontend: All 3 buy buttons present with data-testid
Frontend: Clicking 'Comprar' button does NOT show 'Erro ao iniciar compra' toast - BUG FIXED
Frontend: Clicking 'Comprar' redirects to Stripe checkout (checkout.stripe.com)
critical_code_review_comments: credits.py: Fixed import 'from emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout import StripeCheckout, CheckoutSessionRequest' is correct
credits.py: payment_transactions collection properly records pending transactions with session_id
credits.py: checkout-status endpoint properly handles payment fulfillment with double-credit prevention
reports.py: PDF generation uses reportlab with professional layout, cover page, table of contents, charts
AICredits.js: Uses correct data-testid attributes for testing (package-starter, buy-starter-btn, etc.)
AICredits.js: Proper error handling with toast.error for API failures
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and brand

stripe_integration_verification.issue: AI credits purchase button was throwing 'Erro ao iniciar compra'
stripe_integration_verification.root_cause: Incorrect import path for Stripe checkout
stripe_integration_verification.fix: Changed import to 'from emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout import StripeCheckout, CheckoutSessionRequest'
stripe_integration_verification.verification: VERIFIED - Purchase API returns checkout_url starting with https://checkout.stripe.com and session_id starting with cs_

features_tested: Content-Disposition header includes attachment and .pdf filename
PDF generation with all sections (summary, pillars, score, touchpoints, recommendations)
Report history endpoint returns list of generated reports
